## Checklist

- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] CI is green
- [ ] If site/* changed, previewed locally (`npx http-server site -p 8000`)
- [ ] If template changed, ran the scaffolder + verified output
- [ ] If install-skills changed, ran with `--dry-run` and confirmed expected behavior
- [ ] No PII, secrets, or absolute paths from my machine in the diff
- [ ] Voice + style matches the rest of the repo (no marketing language, describe what *is*)
